title: Eva and the Grasshopper
writer: Robert Reinert, Wilhelm Thiele, Jean de La Fontaine
actors: Camilla Horn, Gustav Fröhlich, Else Burkhardt
plot: Mary and Eva are best friend, although they couldn't be more different. Armand, Mary's fiancee, falls in love with the seductive Eva, who is busy becoming a revue star. When Eva fails and loses her money Armand try ti help her out.
